zh-CN.title: 均衡整合型
zh-CN.one_liner: 你能同时照顾自己的状态、他人的感受和关系目标。
zh-CN.hero_summary: 你能同时照顾自己的状态、他人的感受和关系目标。 最值得看的不是一个高低标签，而是它在哪个场景反复出现，以及今天能练哪一个动作。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你能同时照顾自己的状态、他人的感受和关系目标。
evidence_basis: 由四维分数、维度差距、质量等级和组合机制共同触发。
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你能把情绪、关系和任务放在同一个画面里思考。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 别人可能默认你来稳定局面，久了会变成隐形情绪劳动。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把“我来稳住”改成“我们一起定规则”。
zh-CN.user_memory_sentence: 我能稳定关系，但不必独自维护整个关系系统。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是本次结果的组织方式，不是永久人格标签，也不适合用于临床、招聘或高风险判断。
zh-CN.conversion_hook: 保存报告后，可在复测时比较这个模式是否稳定。

en.title: Balanced Integrator
en.one_liner: You can hold your own state, other people, and the relationship goal in view at the same time.
en.hero_summary: You can hold your own state, other people, and the relationship goal in view at the same time. The useful part is not a high-or-low label; it is the scene where the pattern shows up and the one move to practice next.
en.core_claim: You can hold your own state, other people, and the relationship goal in view at the same time.
evidence_basis: Triggered by dimension scores, score gaps, quality level, and mechanism pattern.
en.primary_strength: You can keep emotion, relationship, and task in the same frame.
en.likely_cost: Others may quietly expect you to stabilize the room, turning your steadiness into hidden labor.
en.development_lever: Move from “I will steady this” to “we need a shared rule.”
en.user_memory_sentence: I can steady a relationship without maintaining the whole system alone.
en.do_not_overread: This is how the current result is organized; it is not a permanent personality label or a basis for clinical, hiring, or high-risk decisions.
en.conversion_hook: Save this report so a future retest can show whether the pattern is stable or changing.

zh-CN.title: 高共情，低恢复
zh-CN.one_liner: 你很快读到别人的状态，但恢复系统常常追不上共情速度。
zh-CN.hero_summary: 你很快读到别人的状态，但恢复系统常常追不上共情速度。 最值得看的不是一个高低标签，而是它在哪个场景反复出现，以及今天能练哪一个动作。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你很快读到别人的状态，但恢复系统常常追不上共情速度。
evidence_basis: 由四维分数、维度差距、质量等级和组合机制共同触发。
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你容易让别人感到被理解，尤其在情绪强烈的时刻。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 你可能把别人的压力带回自己身上，离开场景后还在消化。
zh-CN.development_lever: 练习“理解但不接管”，让共情后面跟着边界。
zh-CN.user_memory_sentence: 我可以理解别人，但不必替别人承受全部情绪。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是本次结果的组织方式，不是永久人格标签，也不适合用于临床、招聘或高风险判断。
zh-CN.conversion_hook: 保存报告后，可在复测时比较这个模式是否稳定。

en.title: High Empathy, Slow Recovery
en.one_liner: You read the room quickly, but recovery can lag behind empathy.
en.hero_summary: You read the room quickly, but recovery can lag behind empathy. The useful part is not a high-or-low label; it is the scene where the pattern shows up and the one move to practice next.
en.core_claim: You read the room quickly, but recovery can lag behind empathy.
evidence_basis: Triggered by dimension scores, score gaps, quality level, and mechanism pattern.
en.primary_strength: You can make people feel understood, especially when emotions run high.
en.likely_cost: You may carry other people’s pressure with you long after the moment ends.
en.development_lever: Practice understanding without taking over, so empathy is followed by boundary.
en.user_memory_sentence: I can understand someone without carrying the whole emotional load.
en.do_not_overread: This is how the current result is organized; it is not a permanent personality label or a basis for clinical, hiring, or high-risk decisions.
en.conversion_hook: Save this report so a future retest can show whether the pattern is stable or changing.

zh-CN.title: 有觉察，调节不足

zh-CN.hero_summary: 你常知道自己怎么了，但把自己带回来需要更长时间。 最值得看的不是一个高低标签，而是它在哪个场景反复出现，以及今天能练哪一个动作。

en.title: Aware, Still Reactive
en.one_liner: You often know what is happening inside, but the reset button is slower than the insight.
en.hero_summary: You often know what is happening inside, but the reset button is slower than the insight. The useful part is not a high-or-low label; it is the scene where the pattern shows up and the one move to practice next.
en.core_claim: You often know what is happening inside, but the reset button is slower than the insight.
evidence_basis: Triggered by dimension scores, score gaps, quality level, and mechanism pattern.
en.primary_strength: You can identify triggers, feelings, and needs with unusual clarity.
en.likely_cost: The clearer the trigger feels, the easier it can be to over-analyze or react too soon.
en.development_lever: Turn awareness into one pause action instead of another layer of explanation.
en.user_memory_sentence: I know what is happening; the next skill is bringing myself back.

zh-CN.title: 冷静稳定，但距离感强

zh-CN.hero_summary: 你能稳住事情，但别人不一定感到被情绪上接住。 最值得看的不是一个高低标签，而是它在哪个场景反复出现，以及今天能练哪一个动作。

en.title: Steady, Less Attuned

en.hero_summary: You can steady the situation, but people may not always feel emotionally met. The useful part is not a high-or-low label; it is the scene where the pattern shows up and the one move to practice next.
